## Goal

Phase C of the Decision Quality Self-Optimization architecture is dark. The `application_event` table has not received a write since 2026-04-30T15:06:00.497Z. Every `[APPLIED]` / `[NOT-APPLIED]` tag emitted by the conductor or any fork in the last 70+ hours has been narration-only with zero telemetry capture. Diagnose root cause and ship the fix.

## Goal

Move the daily INDEX.md regen for `~/ecodiaos/patterns/` off cowork-fork dispatch and onto a direct cron-script execution. The cron currently delegates regen to a fork via `cronForkDispatcher.js`; by 22:00 AEST the daily fork budget (`cowork.daily_fork_budget_remaining`) is exhausted, so the dispatcher rejects the spawn and INDEX.md silently doesn't regen. Status_board row `e86b6437-1315-47b7-87f4-cd6481256966` documents the diagnosis: "INDEX.md regen cron silent-firing since 30 Apr 202
